      }), "\n", _jsx(_components.li, {

        children: "There is no \"catch-up\" mechanism. Realtime is a streaming protocol, not a sync log."

    }), "\n", _jsx(_components.p, {
      children: "Supabase is built on PostgreSQL. The data model is relational: tables, rows, foreign keys, joins. Modern web UIs work with JSON documents.
